title: Tanacetopsis goloskokovii
taxonomy: Tanacetopsis goloskokovii is classified in the family Asteraceae. This plant is a member of the genus Tanacetopsis, which contains a small number of species. The classification of Tanacetopsis goloskokovii at the rank of order is within the Ericales order, but the order that most closely matches is the Asterales order, however it is generally classified in the Asteranae clade. This classification places Tanacetopsis goloskokovii within the broader group of flowering plants. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification at various taxonomic ranks.

constituents: Tanacetopsis goloskokovii contains sesquiterpene lactones, including tanacetopsin and goloskokovin B, which are its active constituents.
